competitors.title: 7 Best AI Coding Tools for Beginners in 2026 (Free Options Inside)
key_points: Cursor (fork of VS Code): Best overall AI coding tool with free tier (2000 completions/month), Pro $20/month
GitHub Copilot: Best for students/budget with free student tier through GitHub Education, $10/month individual
Replit AI: Best browser-based tool with zero setup required, free tier with limits, $13/month Pro
Amazon Q Developer (CodeWhisperer): Best free unlimited tool with no completion limits for individuals
Tabnine: Best for privacy with local AI model option, basic free tier, $12/month Pro
Windsurf (Codeium): Best rising tool with generous free tier, $9/month Pro
ChatGPT/Claude: Best for learning concepts as companion tools, free tiers available
Gartner research: over 75% of developers will use AI coding assistants by end of 2026
